data.name: cmsEditorHotkeys.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Show window with default hot-keys for the "Fast Colored Text Box"

data.name: cmsCodeBlocksFold.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Code Blocks are G-Code surrounded by XML-Elements like "Group" of "Figure"

data.name: cmsCodeBlocksMove.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Code Blocks are G-Code surrounded by XML-Elements like "Group" of "Figure"

data.name: cmsFCTBMoveSelectedCodeBlockMostUp.Text
data.value: Move selected code block most up

data.name: cmsFCTBMoveSelectedCodeBlockMostDown.Text
data.value: Move selected code block most down

data.name: cmsEditMode.AccessibleDescription
data.value: In Edit-Mode automatic selection of groups is disabled

data.name: cmsCodePaste.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Clear editor and paste from clipboard

data.name: cmsCodePasteSpecial1.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Insert "Pen up" G-Code in front of current line

data.name: cmsCodePasteSpecial2.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Insert "Pen down" G-Code in front of current line

data.name: cmsFindDialog.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Open "Find Dialog" from "Fast Colored Text Box"

data.name: cmsReplaceDialog.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Open "Replace Dialog" from "Fast Colored Text Box"

data.name: cmsUpdate2DView.AccessibleDescription
data.value: Process G-Code from editor to update 2D-View

data.name: cmsPicBoxPasteFromClipboard.ToolTipText
data.value: Process data from clipboard, like SVG, DXF, TXT (SVG or GCode) or image

data.name: cmsPicBoxZeroXYAtMarkedPosition.Text
data.value: Zero XY work-pos at marked position G10 L20

data.name: cmsPicBoxZeroXYAtMarkedPosition.ToolTipText
data.value: Set actual work coordinate system to zero at marked position

data.name: cmsPicBoxMoveGraphicsOrigin.ToolTipText
data.value: Applies an offset to all G-Code coordinates, so that the Marker position will get coordinate 0;0.

data.name: cmsPicBoxMoveGraphicsOriginTo00.Text
data.value: Offset graphics -> Marker pos. to (last) tool pos.

data.name: cmsPicBoxMoveGraphicsOriginTo00.ToolTipText
data.value: Applies an offset to all G-Code coordinates, so that the Marker position will get the actual tool coordinate.

data.name: cmsPicBoxMarkFirstPos.Text
data.value: Mark first point of selected path

data.name: cmsPicBoxShowProperties.ToolTipText
data.value: Show or edit properties of selected figure or group

data.name: cmsPicBoxDuplicatePath.ToolTipText
data.value: Duplicate figure or group with optional offset (check [Setup - Program appearance - 2D-View / Editor]

data.name: cmsPicBoxReverseSelectedPath.ToolTipText
data.value: Reverse order of path node - only possible after import of graphic

data.name: cmsPicBoxRotateSelectedPath.ToolTipText
data.value: Rotate start node of selected path to click position- only possible after import of graphic

data.name: saveToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Save displayed G-Code to a file

data.name: saveMachineParametersToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Export GUI-Settings (Button definitions, Joystick parameters) to an INI-file

data.name: loadMachineParametersToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Import GUI-Settings (Button definitions, Joystick parameters) from an INI-file

data.name: englishToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: الإنجليزية Englisch Inglés Anglais 英語 Inglês английский 英语

data.name: deutschToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: ألمانية Deutsch alemán allemand ドイツ人 alemão Немецкий 德语

data.name: pусскийToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: الروسية Russisch ruso russe ロシア russo русский 俄语

data.name: toolStripMenuItem4.ToolTipText
data.value: الأسبانية Spanisch Español Espanol スペイン語 espanhol испанский 西班牙文

data.name: portuguêsToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: البرتغالية Portugiesisch portugués Portugais ポルトガル語 Português португальский 葡萄牙语

data.name: franzToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: الفرنسية Französisch francés français フランス語 francês французкийязык 法文

data.name: italianoToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: إيطالي Italienisch Italiano italština итальянский 意大利语 イタリアの

data.name: PolishToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: اللغة البولندية Polish Polaco Polonais ポーランド語 Polonês польский 波兰语 Polski

data.name: czechToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Czech Tschechisch Checo tchèque Tcheco чешский язык 捷克语 チェコ語 التشيكية

data.name: türkToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: اللغة التركية Turečtina Türkisch Turco Turc Turco トルコ語 Turco турецкий 土耳其

data.name: chinesischToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: صينى Chinesisch chino chinois 中国語 chinês Китайский 中文

data.name: arabischToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: عربى Arabisch Arábica arabe アラビア語 árabe арабский 阿拉伯

data.name: japanischToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: اليابانية japanisch japonés Japonais 日本人 japonês японский язык 日本

data.name: LanguageToolStripMenuItem3.ToolTipText
data.value: Language Sprache язык Idioma Langue Linguaggio Jazyk Dil 语言 لغة 言語

data.name: createSimpleShapesToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Circle or rectangle, optionally with rounded corners, optionally as a bag

data.name: useOrigin.ToolTipText
data.value: Use 0;0 work coordinate as center for mirroring, rotation, and scaling

data.name: rotaryDimaeterToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Set Diameter of part for rotary axis

data.name: ersetzteG23DurchLinienToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Set 'Step width' in [Setup - Graphics import - Path import - General options - Import parameter - Step width on circumference of arcs]

data.name: convertZToSspindleSpeedToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Set maximum Spindle speed for minimum Z in [Setup - Graphics import - G-Code modification]

data.name: laserToolsToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Tool to find best laser settings

data.name: coordinateSystemsToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Check and control all grbl coordinates

data.name: startStreamingAtLineToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Set start line here if G-Code must not start at line 0

data.name: controlStreamingToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Override Feed rate and Spindle speed

data.name: control2ndGRBLToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Opens a simple window to control a second GRBL controller

data.name: control3rdGRBLToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Opens a simple window to control a unit via a 3rd serial com

data.name: projectorToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Opens a new window to display machine-path on the workpiece via a projector above the work bench

data.name: toolStripViewMachineFix.ToolTipText
data.value: Limit and offset can be set via 'Setup' - 'Control' - 'Maschine area'

data.name: toolStripViewMachine.ToolTipText
data.value: Limit and offset can be set via 'Setup' - 'Control' - 'Maschine area'

data.name: toolStripViewTool.ToolTipText
data.value: Limit and offset can be set via 'Setup' - 'Tool change setup' - 'Tool table'

data.name: showFormsToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Brings all open GRBL-Plotter forms (e.g. Text creation) to the front of the z order

data.name: toolStripStatusLabel0.Text
data.value: [ Load file via drag and drop to 2D-view or select 'Reload File' (right click on 2D-view) to open last used file. ]

data.name: cms2ToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Apply an offset to all G-Code coordinates, so that the Marker position will get coordinate 0;0.

data.name: offsetGraphicsMarkerPositionTolastToolPositionToolStripMenuItem.Text
data.value: Offset graphics -> Marker pos. to (last) tool pos.

data.name: offsetGraphicsMarkerPositionTolastToolPositionToolStripMenuItem.ToolTipText
data.value: Apply an offset to all G-Code coordinates, so that the Marker position will get the actual tool coordinate.

data.name: fCTBCode.Hotkeys
data.value: Tab=IndentIncrease, Escape=ClearHints, PgUp=GoPageUp, PgDn=GoPageDown, End=GoEnd, Home=GoHome, Left=GoLeft, Up=GoUp, Right=GoRight, Down=GoDown, Ins=ReplaceMode, Del=DeleteCharRight, F3=FindNext, Shift+Tab=IndentDecrease, Shift+PgUp=GoPageUpWithSelection, Shift+PgDn=GoPageDownWithSelection, Shift+End=GoEndWithSelection, Shift+Home=GoHomeWithSelection, Shift+Left=GoLeftWithSelection, Shift+Up=GoUpWithSelection, Shift+Right=GoRightWithSelection, Shift+Down=GoDownWithSelection, Shift+Ins=Paste, Shift+Del=Cut, Ctrl+Back=ClearWordLeft, Ctrl+Space=AutocompleteMenu, Ctrl+End=GoLastLine, Ctrl+Home=GoFirstLine, Ctrl+Ins=Copy, Ctrl+Del=ClearWordRight, Ctrl+0=ZoomNormal, Ctrl+A=SelectAll, Ctrl+B=BookmarkLine, Ctrl+C=Copy, Ctrl+E=MacroExecute, Ctrl+F=FindDialog, Ctrl+G=GoToDialog, Ctrl+H=ReplaceDialog, Ctrl+I=AutoIndentChars, Ctrl+M=MacroRecord, Ctrl+N=GoNextBookmark, Ctrl+R=Redo, Ctrl+U=UpperCase, Ctrl+V=Paste, Ctrl+X=Cut, Ctrl+Z=Undo, Ctrl+Add=ZoomIn, Ctrl+Subtract=ZoomOut, Ctrl+Shift+End=GoLastLineWithSelection, Ctrl+Shift+Home=GoFirstLineWithSelection, Ctrl+Shift+B=UnbookmarkLine, Ctrl+Shift+C=CommentSelected, Ctrl+Shift+N=GoPrevBookmark, Ctrl+Shift+U=LowerCase, Alt+Back=Undo, Alt+Up=MoveSelectedLinesUp, Alt+Down=MoveSelectedLinesDown, Alt+F=FindChar

data.name: tLPLinks.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="ucStreaming" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="ucOverrides" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="fCTBCode" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="ucFlowControl" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="ucSetOffset" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="Absolute,160,Absolute,245,Absolute,115,Absolute,100,Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tLPRechtsUntenRechts.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="ucMoveToGraphic" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="ucMoveToZero" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="ucJogControlAll" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tC_RouterPlotterLaser2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="ucSetCoordinateSystem" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="AutoSize,0" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: CbAddGraphic.ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, the new imported G-Code will be inserted to the already existing code. Changing import settings after the first import can lead to undesired effects.

data.name: tBURL.Text
data.value: Paste URL of SVG / DXF file here

data.name: Rb2DViewMode1.ToolTip
data.value: Enables the edit mode for the 2DView to edit figures - check context menu on right click

data.name: Rb2DViewMode2.ToolTip
data.value: Enable jog mode on figure: moves tool to gcode position which is closest to clicked position

data.name: Rb2DViewMode3.ToolTip
data.value: Enables the jog mode on machine area, moves tool to clicked position. Alt-click rounds position to 0.1 raster,

data.name: tLPMitteUnten1Zeile.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="Rb2DViewMode1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="Rb2DViewMode2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="Rb2DViewMode3" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tLPMitteUnten.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="pictureBox1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="CbAddGraphic" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tBURL" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tLPMitteUnten1Zeile" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100,Absolute,24,Absolute,24,Absolute,24" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="tLPRechtsUntenRechts" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tLPMitteUnten" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,100,AutoSize,0" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tLPCustomButton2.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="btnCustom1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom2" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom3" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom4" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom5" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom6" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom7" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom8" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom9" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom10" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom11" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom12" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom13" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom14" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom15" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnCustom16" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25" /><Rows Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tLPCustomButton1.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="tLPCustomButton2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="flowLayoutPanel1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,50,Percent,50" /><Rows Styles="Percent,50" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: IndividualSettings.Text
data.value: Only if this tab is visible, the import settings from the setup will be fully applied.

data.name: tLPRechtsOben.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="ucdro" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="splitContainer2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="AutoSize,0,Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tLPRechts.LayoutSettings
